name.description: Full display name of the CTF. Example: NorthSec CTF 2027

uses_cfss.description: Whether the CTF uses CFSS scoring. When false, CFSS-specific validators are skipped.

oneOf.description: No frontend. All discourse-related validators are skipped.

disabled_validators.description: List of validator class names to skip regardless of other settings. Example: OrphanServicesValidator
